## What & why

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation behind it. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] 🎨 Design / theming

## Checklist

- [ ] `cd core && cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cd core && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cd core && cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cd app && swift build` succeeds
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense
- [ ] I updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing behavior changed
